ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_type" TEXT /* Type of jurisdiction (e.g., national, state, territory) */,
  "parent_jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Parent jurisdiction ID (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates or boundaries for mapping and spatial analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction for this data entry */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for this data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was reported or updated */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "one_dose_rate" REAL /* Percentage of population with at least one dose */,
  "two_dose_rate" REAL /* Percentage of population with two doses */,
  "third_dose_rate" REAL /* Percentage of eligible population with third dose */,
  "fourth_dose_rate" REAL /* Percentage of eligible population with fourth dose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_eligibility" (
  "eligibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eligibility entry */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction for this eligibility entry */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for this eligibility entry (e.g., 16+, 30+) */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility (e.g., age, health conditions, occupation) */,
  "booster_shot_type" TEXT /* Type of booster shot (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna, AstraZeneca) */,
  "eligible_population" INTEGER /* Number of people eligible for the booster shot in this age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eligibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_eligibility_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time for each user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to this role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdiction_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction in this hierarchy entry */,
  "parent_jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent jurisdiction in this hierarchy entry */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level in the hierarchy (e.g., 1 for national, 2 for state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jurisdiction_hierarchy_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry for this version */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry was changed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_version_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)
